summary: Critical deliverables missing: Bump-SemanticVersion.Tests.ps1 and fixtures/{patch,minor,major}-commits.txt are referenced throughout the workflow and test harness but not provided. This breaks the entire deliverable since the task requires TDD with Pester tests and mock fixtures. Additional issues: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (security best practice); (2) Bump-SemanticVersion.ps1 lacks $ErrorActionPreference='Stop' and Set-StrictMode; (3) workflow jobs bump-patch/bump-minor/bump-major (lines 46-104) are ~70% duplicate—should use matrix strategy; (4) run-tests.ps1 hardcodes expectations (line 112: 'Tests Passed: 24') that depend on unseen test file. The Bump-SemanticVersion.ps1 core logic is solid, and test harness approach is comprehensive in intent, but incomplete implementation and lack of defensive coding prevent production readiness.
